name: Elegant Chocolate Log
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together 1-1/4 cup confectioners sugar, flour, salt, and cocoa three times. Set aside.
2. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar in a bowl until stiff peaks form using an electric mixer at high speed. Set aside.
3. Beat egg yolks in another bowl until thick and lemon-colored, using an electric mixer at high speed.
4. Beat in vanilla and water. Blend in dry ingredients, beating well.
5. Fold in beaten egg whites. Spread batter in a greased and waxed paper-lined 15x10x1 inch jelly roll pan.
6. Bake in a 375°F oven for 15-20 minutes or until cake tests done. Meanwhile, lightly dust a clean dish towel with confectioners sugar.
7. Loosen the cake around the edges with a spatula and invert it on the towel. Lift off the pan and carefully peel off the paper. With a sharp knife, cut off crisp edges.
8. Roll up the cake gently, from the narrow end, by folding the edge of the cake over and then tucking it into the towel. Continue rolling the cake, using the towel as an aid.
9. Let the cake cool in the towel on a rack.
10. Whip heavy cream in a bowl until thickened, using an electric mixer at high speed. Add sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
11. Fold in marshmallows. Unroll the cake and spread with cream mixture.
12. Reroll the cake (without the towel). Combine cooled chocolate and 2 cups sifted confectioners sugar in a bowl. Add enough light cream to make a frosting of spreading consistency. Spread over the cake roll.
13. Sprinkle with pecans. Refrigerate until serving time. Makes 10 servings.
Origin: Farm Journal's Choice Chocolate Recipes
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
